description: As a Marine Cargo Surveyor, create a preliminary stowage manifest for five liquid bulk chemicals using CAMEO Chemicals (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/): Acrylonitrile, Morpholine, Styrene monomer, Sulfuric acid, and Propionic acid. For each chemical, identify the USCG CHRIS Code and the USCG Compatibility Group number (used for 46 CFR 150). Create a CSV file at '~/Desktop/marine_manifest.csv' with the headers 'Chemical Name, CHRIS Code, USCG Group' containing the data for all five chemicals. Note: Ensure you use the USCG Compatibility Group number, NOT the NOAA Reactive Group.
